ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO WEDNESDAY NOVEMBER 3, 2010 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 220. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES LLC, (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS DANA CORPORATION)'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AND ITS ALTERNATE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO ISSUES 1 AND 2 (NEGLIGENCE AND STRICT LIABILITY) AND GRANTED AS TO ISSUES 3, 4 AND 5 (FALSE REPRESENTATION, CONCERT OF ACTION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES). THE EXCERPTS FROM PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TRANSCRIPT PRECLUDE DEFENDANT FROM SATISFYING ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT POSSESS AND CANNOT REASONABLY OBTAIN EVIDENCE TO PROVE THAT HE WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS FROM VICTOR GASKETS. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THE LACK OF MERIT OF HIS CLAIMS FOR FALSE REPRESENTATION AND CONCERT OF ACTION AND REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Jesse Ledesma

RULING:
DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES LLC, (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS DANA CORPORATION)'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Dana Companies LLC's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to issues 1 and 2 (negligence and strict liability) and granted as to issues 3, 4 and 5 (false representation, concert of action and punitive damages). The excerpts from plaintiff's deposition transcript preclude defendant from satisfying its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence to prove that he was exposed to asbestos from Victor gaskets. Plaintiff concedes the lack of merit of his claims for false representation and concert of action and request for punitive damages. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
